executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
CRITICAL RULES (MUST FOLLOW EXACTLY):
1. DO NOT use /api/finance/* - they don't exist. Use:
   - /api/accounting/journal-entries (NOT /api/finance/accounting/*)
   - /api/treasury/transactions/transfer (NOT /api/finance/treasury/*)
2. Login: POST /api/auth/login with [username='zzzz', password='As123321', company_code='ae4e964a'] returns {"access_token":"..."}
3. Do NOT test: /api/auth/2fa/*, / (root path), or non-existent endpoints.
4. Routes: GET /api/companies/list, POST /api/roles, POST /api/buying/orders, GET /api/sales/orders, GET /api/inventory/suppliers, POST /api/inventory/suppliers
5. All secured operations use Bearer {token} from fresh login
6. Validate: tax calculations, totals, currency conversion, journal balancing
